label: The Library — fixes & polish
items: Care Guide tab now shows the full read-only care form (sunlight, watering, propagation, pruning, edibility, toxicity, wildlife, etc.) — the same layout you see in The Shed.
Grow Guide auto-generates the moment you tap the tab — no separate Generate button anymore.
AI search results now show a thumbnail (sourced from Wikipedia / Pixabay) instead of just a sparkles icon.
Tapping Back from a plant preview restores your previous search results instantly — no more re-searching.
Added a Quick Menu link at the top of The Library so you can return to the Quick Access home in one tap.
Fixed a 500 error when opening some Perenual plants — the proxy now falls back to v1 when v2 fails, and surfaces clearer errors when both upstream endpoints break.

label: Quick Access — softer tiles & app-colour palette
items: Lightened the tile colours — softer, more see-through, less shouty than the previous solid blocks.
Brought back the short description under each title and shrunk the tiles to content size so they no longer feel empty.
Aligned the tile colours with the rest of the app: green (Visual Lens), amber (Today), red (Quick Capture), blue (The Library).
The greeting card at the top is now tappable — opens Account Settings.
